action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 3 trained a deeper UNet (4-level, dropout 0.1) for 20 epochs, achieved val_rmse_z500=1.1165 (normalized), down from 1.1688 baseline. Training time 1032s, leaving ample budget. Analysis: Improvement direction is correct; architecture can be further enhanced. Need to submit eval to get updated raw metric and confirm progress. Decision: Submit eval with best checkpoint from iter 3 (epoch 19). Then plan next architecture improvements.
